seo.title: Purcell Cabinetry & Furniture | Expert Carpenter in Dallas, TX
seo.description: Purcell Cabinetry & Furniture offers custom carpentry, cabinetry, and furniture in Dallas, TX. Quality craftsmanship, free quotes. Call (214) 328-8550.

hero.headline: Custom Cabinetry & Furniture Built to Last
hero.subheadline: From bespoke kitchen cabinets to heirloom-quality furniture, we bring your vision to life with precision woodworking.

featureSections.title: Custom Design & Build
featureSections.body: Every piece we create is designed around your space, style, and needs. Our collaborative process ensures your furniture or cabinetry fits perfectly and reflects your personality.
bullets: Finish options to match your decor
featureSections.cardBody: We guide you through design, material selection, and construction, keeping you informed every step of the way.

featureSections.title: Heirloom-Quality Craftsmanship
featureSections.body: We use time-tested joinery techniques and premium materials to create pieces that last generations. Our attention to detail ensures every drawer glides smoothly and every corner aligns perfectly.
featureSections.cardTitle: The Best Wood for Your Project
featureSections.cardBody: We source domestic and exotic hardwoods, including oak, cherry, walnut, and maple, to match your aesthetic and budget.

whyChooseUs.title: Decades of Expertise
whyChooseUs.description: With over 35 years in the Dallas area, we have the skills to handle any project, from simple repairs to intricate custom builds.

whyChooseUs.title: Personalized Service
whyChooseUs.description: You work directly with the craftsman. No salespeople, no middlemen — just honest communication and exceptional results.

whyChooseUs.title: Premium Materials
whyChooseUs.description: We use only solid hardwoods and top-grade plywood. Our finishes are durable and environmentally friendly.

whyChooseUs.title: Guaranteed Satisfaction
whyChooseUs.description: We stand behind our work with a warranty on craftsmanship. Your happiness is our priority.

testimonials.quote: Purcell built custom bookshelves for our living room. The attention to detail was incredible — they fit perfectly and look like they've always been there.
testimonials.author: Sarah M.

testimonials.quote: We hired Purcell for a complete kitchen cabinet remodel. They were professional, on time, and the quality is outstanding. Highly recommend.
testimonials.author: James T.

testimonials.quote: I needed a custom dining table. The team listened to my ideas and created something even better than I imagined. It's the centerpiece of our home.
testimonials.author: Linda R.

cta.headline: Ready to Start Your Project?
cta.subheadline: Get a free, no-obligation quote for your custom carpentry needs.

servicesPage.intro: From concept to creation, we offer a full range of custom carpentry services for your Dallas home. Each service is tailored to your needs and built with the highest quality standards.

services.title: Custom Cabinetry
services.shortDescription: Bespoke kitchen, bathroom, and storage cabinets designed to maximize space and style.
services.longDescription: Our custom cabinetry service transforms your kitchen, bathroom, or any room with cabinets built to your exact specifications. We handle everything from initial design to installation, using premium hardwoods and durable finishes. Whether you prefer modern, traditional, or rustic, we create cabinets that enhance your home's functionality and beauty.
benefits: Personalized design to match your decor
Durable construction that lasts for decades

process.title: Consultation
process.description: We meet at your home to discuss your needs, measure the space, and review design options.

process.title: Design & Material Selection
process.description: We create detailed drawings and help you choose wood, finish, and hardware.

process.title: Construction & Installation
process.description: Our team builds your cabinets in our workshop and installs them with precision.

faqs.question: How long does it take to build custom cabinets?
faqs.answer: Typically 4-6 weeks from design approval to installation, depending on complexity.

faqs.question: What types of wood do you use?
faqs.answer: We offer oak, cherry, maple, walnut, and more. We'll help you choose the best option for your style and budget.

services.title: Custom Furniture
services.shortDescription: One-of-a-kind tables, chairs, beds, and more crafted to your taste.
services.longDescription: Our custom furniture service brings your dream pieces to life. Whether you need a dining table that seats twelve, a unique headboard, or a set of nightstands, we design and build furniture that fits your space and reflects your personal style. Each piece is handcrafted with traditional joinery and finished to perfection.
benefits: Furniture that fits your exact dimensions
Unique design not found in stores

process.title: Idea & Design
process.description: We discuss your vision, show you design options, and create a custom plan.

process.title: Material & Finish Selection
process.description: Choose from a variety of hardwoods, stains, and paints to achieve your desired look.

process.title: Crafting & Delivery
process.description: We build your furniture in our Dallas workshop and deliver it to your home.

faqs.question: Can you replicate a piece I saw online?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can create a custom version of almost any design, tailored to your space.

faqs.question: What is the typical cost for a custom table?
faqs.answer: Pricing depends on size, wood, and complexity. We provide a detailed quote before starting.

services.title: Built-In Shelving & Storage
services.shortDescription: Custom built-ins that add character and organization to any room.
services.longDescription: Maximize your space with custom built-in shelving, bookcases, entertainment centers, and window seats. Our built-ins are designed to blend seamlessly with your home's architecture while providing practical storage. We can match existing trim and moldings for a cohesive look.

process.title: Site Visit
process.description: We measure the area and discuss your storage needs and design preferences.

process.title: Design & Approval
process.description: We create a 3D rendering and finalize materials and finishes.

process.title: Installation
process.description: Our team installs the built-ins with minimal disruption to your home.

faqs.question: How long does installation take?
faqs.answer: Most built-ins are installed in 1-3 days, depending on the size and complexity.

faqs.question: Can you match existing trim?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can replicate crown molding, baseboards, and other details for a seamless look.

services.title: Repair & Restoration
services.shortDescription: Expert repairs and refinishing for your treasured wooden pieces.
services.longDescription: Breathe new life into your existing furniture and woodwork. Our repair and restoration services fix broken joints, replace damaged veneers, and refinish surfaces to restore their original beauty. We also repair cabinets, doors, and trim to keep your home looking its best.
benefits: Extends the life of your furniture

process.title: Assessment
process.description: We inspect the piece and provide a detailed estimate for repairs.

process.title: Repair Work
process.description: We perform structural repairs, replace missing parts, and refinish surfaces.

process.title: Final Touches
process.description: We match stains and finishes to ensure a seamless restoration.

faqs.question: Can you repair water damage?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can often repair water-damaged wood by replacing affected sections and refinishing.

faqs.question: Do you refinish kitchen cabinets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We can refinish your existing cabinets to give them a fresh look without full replacement.

about.headline: Crafting Excellence in Dallas Since 1985
about.mission: To create beautiful, functional woodwork that enriches homes and stands the test of time.
story: Purcell Cabinetry & Furniture was founded by master carpenter John Purcell, who started building furniture in his garage. With a passion for quality and an eye for detail, John quickly built a reputation for exceptional work. Over the decades, our team has grown, but our commitment to handcrafted excellence remains unchanged.

Today, we serve homeowners across Dallas, from Highland Park to Lakewood. Every project is approached with the same dedication: listen to the client, use the best materials, and deliver a piece that exceeds expectations. We take pride in our work and treat every home as if it were our own.

coreValues.title: Quality First
coreValues.description: We never compromise on materials or workmanship. Every joint, finish, and detail meets our high standards.

coreValues.title: Customer Partnership
coreValues.description: We collaborate closely with you to ensure the final product matches your vision perfectly.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We provide honest advice, transparent pricing, and stand behind our work with a satisfaction guarantee.

coreValues.title: Sustainability
coreValues.description: We source wood responsibly and minimize waste, creating pieces that are both beautiful and eco-friendly.

contact.headline: Let's Build Something Beautiful Together
contact.subheadline: Contact us for a free consultation and quote. We'd love to hear about your project.
